MOTIVATION_CARD.TITLE: Motivation
MOTIVATION_CARD.EARLY: You have logged only {{ percent }}% of your goal — keep it up!
MOTIVATION_CARD.MID: Great progress! You're already at {{ percent }}% of the plan.
MOTIVATION_CARD.NEARLY: Almost there. Finish strong to hit {{ percent }}%.
MOTIVATION_CARD.ABOVE: You've passed the target for today. Nice work!

DAILY_PROGRESS_CARD.TITLE: Daily progress
DAILY_PROGRESS_CARD.NO_GOAL_HINT: Set a daily calorie target (and macros) in your profile to see progress here.
DAILY_PROGRESS_CARD.PLACEHOLDER: Your progress will appear here once a goal is set.

MOTIVATION.NONE: You haven't logged anything yet - a great time to start!
MOTIVATION.P0_10: Just getting started. A few bites logged, keep going!
MOTIVATION.P10_20: Warm-up phase — you're at {{ percent }}% of your goal.
MOTIVATION.P60_70: Strong progress — {{ percent }}% on the board.
MOTIVATION.P90_110: Goal met! You're around {{ percent }}% today.
MOTIVATION.P110_200: You've gone over the target ({{ percent }}%). Keep balance in mind.
MOTIVATION.ABOVE_200: Far above the plan ({{ percent }}%). Consider adjusting tomorrow.

PRODUCT_LIST.TITLE: Products
PRODUCT_LIST.SUBTITLE: Browse and manage your products
PRODUCT_LIST.EMPTY_COPY: Add your first product to reuse nutrition data, build meals faster, and keep your own catalogue handy.

TOUR.ACTIONS_TEXT: Use these actions to narrow the catalogue, add your own product, or scan food from a barcode.
TOUR.SEARCH_TEXT: Search by name or barcode. The scanner button fills the search from a package barcode.
TOUR.FAVORITES_TEXT: Favorite products stay close so you can add common foods to meals faster.
TOUR.RESULTS_TEXT: Recent and full catalogue sections help you open details, favorite products, or add them to a meal.

TOUR.SUMMARY_TEXT: The summary cards show intake, averages, and export actions for the selected period.
TOUR.NUTRITION_TEXT: Use these charts to compare calories, macros, and nutrient distribution over time.
TOUR.BODY_TEXT: Weight, BMI, waist, and WHtR charts help compare body changes with your diary data.
TOUR.HELP_TEXT: This help button restarts the statistics tour whenever you need a reminder.

AI_CONSENT.TITLE: AI Usage Consent
AI_CONSENT.TEXT:
We use AI (e.g., OpenAI) to recognize food.

When using AI features:

  • your data (text, voice, photos) is sent for processing
  • data may be processed by third-party services
  • data may be transferred outside the EU

You can disable AI in settings at any time.

More in Privacy Policy
AI_CONSENT.AGREE_LABEL: I have read and agree to the processing of my data as described above

LEVEL_3.TITLE: Slightly hungry
LEVEL_3.DESCRIPTION: A little hungry, but still comfortable.

LEVEL_4.TITLE: Barely hungry
LEVEL_4.DESCRIPTION: Hunger is weak or almost gone.

LEVEL_1.TITLE: Still hungry
LEVEL_1.DESCRIPTION: Hunger is still noticeable after eating.

LEVEL_2.TITLE: Not quite full
LEVEL_2.DESCRIPTION: Satiety is light and more food still sounds good.

LEVEL_5.TITLE: Overate
LEVEL_5.DESCRIPTION: Too much food, with heaviness or discomfort.

LEVEL_0.TITLE: Not tracked
LEVEL_0.DESCRIPTION: Use this when no feeling was captured.

LEVEL_7.TITLE: Full
LEVEL_7.DESCRIPTION: Heavy stomach, better to stop now.

APPEARANCE.TITLE: Adjust your dashboard look
APPEARANCE.SUBTITLE: Choose a theme and UI style without leaving the page. Changes preview instantly here on the dashboard.
APPEARANCE.THEME_HINT: Pick the mood and color direction that fits how you want the dashboard to feel.
APPEARANCE.UI_STYLE_HINT: Adjust corner softness and visual accents without changing the theme itself.
APPEARANCE.THEME_DESCRIPTION_OCEAN: Clear blue accents and a crisp everyday default.
APPEARANCE.THEME_DESCRIPTION_LEAF: Softer green surfaces for a calmer, lighter workspace.
APPEARANCE.THEME_DESCRIPTION_DARK: A lower-glare dark palette for late sessions and contrast.
APPEARANCE.UI_STYLE_DESCRIPTION_CLASSIC: Softer shapes and a more familiar interface rhythm.
APPEARANCE.UI_STYLE_DESCRIPTION_MODERN: Sharper corners and slightly stronger visual accents.
APPEARANCE.ERROR: Couldn't save the new appearance. Restored your previous look.

WHT_STATUS_DESC.HIGH: We recommend creating a plan with your doctor.

TOUR.PERIOD_DESCRIPTION: Switch between week, month, year, or a custom date range for the chart.
TOUR.CHART_DESCRIPTION: Track how your waist measurement changes across the selected period.
TOUR.ENTRY_FORM_DESCRIPTION: Add a new measurement or edit an existing one from the history list.
TOUR.GOAL_DESCRIPTION: Set the waist goal used by body progress insights.
TOUR.ENTRIES_DESCRIPTION: Review previous entries and edit or delete incorrect logs.
TOUR.HELP_DESCRIPTION: Use this help button whenever you want a quick reminder of this page.

CYCLE_TRACKING.TITLE: Cycle tracking
CYCLE_TRACKING.SUBTITLE: Log menstrual days and daily symptoms in one place
CYCLE_TRACKING.NUTRITION_SUMMARY_EMPTY: Log cycle days and meals in the same period to see nutrition overlap.
CYCLE_TRACKING.NUTRITION_SUMMARY_LIMITED: More paired cycle and meal days are needed before comparing bleeding and non-bleeding nutrition.
CYCLE_TRACKING.NO_CYCLE_COPY: Start a cycle to see predictions and log days.
CYCLE_TRACKING.PREDICTIONS_LIMITED_BODY: Active mode or factors make calendar estimates less reliable. Confidence: {{confidence}}.
CYCLE_TRACKING.CARE_SEVERE_PAIN: Severe pain can be worth discussing with a clinician, especially if it disrupts normal activity.
CYCLE_TRACKING.CARE_HEAVY_FLOW: Heavy bleeding is logged here. Consider tracking context and seeking care if it is unusual or hard to manage.
CYCLE_TRACKING.CARE_PROLONGED_BLEEDING: Bleeding has been logged for 8+ days in a row. A clinician-friendly record may help if this is unusual for you.

TOUR.SETUP_DESCRIPTION: Set cycle length, period length, tracking mode, and notification preferences.
TOUR.CURRENT_DESCRIPTION: Review the current cycle phase, predictions, and logged status.
TOUR.DAY_LOG_DESCRIPTION: Record bleeding, symptoms, fertility details, and notes for a specific day.
TOUR.FACTORS_DESCRIPTION: Track events that may affect predictions, such as contraception or postpartum changes.
TOUR.HISTORY_DESCRIPTION: Review saved cycle days and edit or clear records when needed.
TOUR.HELP_DESCRIPTION: Use this help button whenever you want a quick reminder of this page.

FASTING.TITLE: Intermittent fasting
FASTING.SUBTITLE: Track your fasting sessions and build healthy habits

TOUR.TIMER_TEXT: Start, finish, extend, or adjust the active fasting cycle from the main timer card.
TOUR.STATS_TEXT: This card summarizes recent fasting consistency and completed session progress.
TOUR.CHECK_IN_TEXT: Log hunger, energy, mood, symptoms, and notes so each session has context.
TOUR.INSIGHTS_TEXT: Insights surface prompts and patterns that can help you adjust your fasting routine.
TOUR.HISTORY_TEXT: Review previous sessions, check-ins, and charts to compare how different fasts felt.
TOUR.HELP_TEXT: This help button restarts the fasting tour whenever you need a reminder.

FASTING.EATING_WINDOW_DESCRIPTION: Meal window before the next fasting cycle starts.
FASTING.SKIP_DAY_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: The current fast day will be marked as skipped and the cycle will move to an eat day.
FASTING.SKIP_FASTING_PERIOD_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: The current fasting period will be skipped and the cycle will switch to an eating period.
FASTING.SKIP_EATING_PERIOD_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: The current eating period will be skipped and the cycle will switch to a fasting period.
FASTING.START_FAST_NOW_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: The current eating period will end now and the fasting period will start immediately.
FASTING.POSTPONE_DAY_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: The current fast day will be marked as postponed and the cycle will temporarily move to an eat day.
FASTING.SKIP_FAST_DAY_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: The current fast day will end today, and the eating period will continue tomorrow.
FASTING.POSTPONE_NEXT_FAST_TO_TOMORROW_CONFIRM_T: Move the next fast to tomorrow?
FASTING.POSTPONE_NEXT_FAST_TO_TOMORROW_CONFIRM_M: The current eating period will be extended by one day, and the next fasting period will start tomorrow.
FASTING.EXTEND_EATING_PERIOD_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: The current eating day will be extended by one more day, and the next fasting period will start tomorrow.
FASTING.SKIP_EATING_DAY_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: The current eating day will end today, and the next fasting period will start tomorrow.
FASTING.END_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to finish fasting?
FASTING.INTERRUPT_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to interrupt fasting?
FASTING.STOP_CYCLE_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: The current cyclic fasting plan will be stopped. The current cycle day will end and remain in history.
FASTING.EXTEND_WARNING_MESSAGE: Fasting longer than 72 hours can be dangerous to your health. Continue only under medical supervision.
FASTING.LIFE_RISK_MESSAGE: Fasting longer than 168 hours is life-threatening and cannot be added.

CHECK_IN.TITLE: Today's check-in
CHECK_IN.SUBTITLE: Log how the fast feels so you can notice patterns and stop early if something feels off.
CHECK_IN.HUNGER_LEVEL_1_DESCRIPTION: Hard to wait, strong physical hunger.
CHECK_IN.HUNGER_LEVEL_3_DESCRIPTION: Some hunger signals, no strong discomfort.
CHECK_IN.HUNGER_LEVEL_4_DESCRIPTION: Low hunger and easy to continue.
CHECK_IN.ENERGY_LEVEL_1_DESCRIPTION: Very low energy, consider pausing or ending the fast.
CHECK_IN.ENERGY_LEVEL_2_DESCRIPTION: Energy is reduced and needs attention.
CHECK_IN.ENERGY_LEVEL_3_DESCRIPTION: Enough energy for a normal pace.
CHECK_IN.ENERGY_LEVEL_4_DESCRIPTION: Strong energy and clear enough to continue.
CHECK_IN.MOOD_LEVEL_3_DESCRIPTION: Stable mood without a clear positive or negative shift.
CHECK_IN.MOOD_LEVEL_5_DESCRIPTION: Very good mood and easy to keep going.
CHECK_IN.NOTES_PLACEHOLDER: Optional notes about cravings, focus, hydration, or anything unusual.

SYMPTOM_HINTS.HEADACHE: Choose this when fasting comes with head pressure or pain.
SYMPTOM_HINTS.WEAKNESS: Choose this when your body feels weak, shaky, or unusually tired.
SYMPTOM_HINTS.IRRITABILITY: Choose this when fasting makes you noticeably more irritated or short-tempered.
SYMPTOM_HINTS.DIZZINESS: Choose this when you feel lightheaded, dizzy, or unstable.
SYMPTOM_HINTS.CRAVINGS: Choose this when food cravings are strong enough to distract you.
SYMPTOM_HINTS.GOOD: Choose this when the fast feels fine and no warning symptoms stand out.

INSIGHTS.TITLE: Insights
INSIGHTS.EMPTY: Add a few fasting check-ins to start seeing patterns.
INSIGHTS.CURRENT_WARNING_BODY: Low energy together with weakness or dizziness is a good point to pause, hydrate, or end the fast if it keeps getting worse.
INSIGHTS.SHORTER_FASTS_BODY: Your recent check-ins suggest that shorter fasting sessions feel better than longer ones.
INSIGHTS.RECURRING_SYMPTOM_BODY: {{symptom}} has shown up in multiple check-ins. It may be worth adjusting duration, hydration, or timing.
INSIGHTS.POSITIVE_BODY: Recent check-ins show strong energy and mood without obvious warning symptoms.

PROMPTS.MID_BODY: You are well into this fast already. A short check-in now will make later patterns much easier to spot.
PROMPTS.LATE_TITLE: This is a good point to reassess
PROMPTS.LATE_BODY: This fast has gone on for a while without a check-in. Log energy, mood, and symptoms before continuing.
PROMPTS.RISKY_BODY: Recent symptoms suggest this fast may be too rough right now. Hydrate, pause, or end it if things are getting worse.

EARLY.TITLE: Early fast
EARLY.DESCRIPTION: Your body is still working through recent energy intake.

TRANSITION.TITLE: Transition stage
TRANSITION.DESCRIPTION: You are moving away from the last meal and relying more on stored energy.

STORED_ENERGY.TITLE: Stored energy stage
STORED_ENERGY.DESCRIPTION: This is often the point where fasting starts to feel more focused and steady.

DEEP.TITLE: Deep fasting stage
DEEP.DESCRIPTION: A longer fast can feel different here, so check energy, hydration, and overall comfort.

GAMIFICATION.TITLE: Achievements
GAMIFICATION.SUBTITLE: Track your progress, earn badges, and build healthy habits
GAMIFICATION.HEALTH_SCORE_HINT: Based on logging consistency, goal adherence, and activity

TOUR.STATS_DESCRIPTION: Review streaks, logged meals, and weekly adherence at a glance.
TOUR.HEALTH_SCORE_DESCRIPTION: This score combines consistency, goal adherence, and activity signals.
TOUR.BADGES_DESCRIPTION: Earn badges as you build consistent nutrition habits.
TOUR.HELP_DESCRIPTION: Use this help button whenever you want a quick reminder of this page.

WEEKLY_CHECK_IN.TITLE: Weekly review
WEEKLY_CHECK_IN.SUBTITLE: Your nutrition progress compared to last week
WEEKLY_CHECK_IN.suggestion.log_more_days: Try to log meals at least 5 days a week for better tracking.
WEEKLY_CHECK_IN.suggestion.over_calorie_goal: You exceeded your calorie goal this week. Consider smaller portions.
WEEKLY_CHECK_IN.suggestion.under_calorie_goal: You're under your calorie target. Make sure you're eating enough.
WEEKLY_CHECK_IN.suggestion.on_track: Great job! You're on track with your calorie goals.
WEEKLY_CHECK_IN.suggestion.weight_increasing: Your weight went up this week. Review your calorie intake.
WEEKLY_CHECK_IN.suggestion.weight_decreasing: Your weight is going down. Keep up the good work!
WEEKLY_CHECK_IN.suggestion.drink_more_water: Your water intake is low. Aim for at least 1.5L per day.
WEEKLY_CHECK_IN.suggestion.low_protein: Your protein intake is low. Consider adding more protein sources.

TOUR.TRENDS_DESCRIPTION: Compare this week with the previous one across key nutrition and body metrics.
TOUR.STATS_DESCRIPTION: See the main totals and averages for the current weekly review.
TOUR.SUGGESTIONS_DESCRIPTION: Use personalized suggestions to adjust the next week of tracking.
TOUR.HELP_DESCRIPTION: Use this help button whenever you want a quick reminder of this page.

GOALS_PAGE.TITLE: Goals
GOALS_PAGE.SUBTITLE: Customize your daily nutrition targets and body goals. Blocks use placeholder data for now.
GOALS_PAGE.NUTRITION_PLACEHOLDER: Hook this card to your macro targets to see live progress.
GOALS_PAGE.BODY_PLACEHOLDER: Connect your measurements and goals to replace these stubs soon.

TOUR.CALORIES_TEXT: Set your main calorie target with the ring, slider, or direct input.
TOUR.CYCLING_TEXT: Enable cycling when different weekdays should have different calorie targets.
TOUR.WATER_TEXT: Adjust your daily water goal so hydration appears alongside nutrition goals.
TOUR.MACROS_TEXT: Choose a preset or tune protein, carbs, and fats manually for your routine.
TOUR.BODY_TEXT: Track weight and waist targets so dashboard trend cards have clear context.
TOUR.HELP_TEXT: This help button restarts the goals tour whenever you need a reminder.

BARCODE_SCANNER.UNSUPPORTED: Barcode scanning is not available on this device or browser version. Enter the barcode manually instead.

DASHBOARD_SUMMARY.TITLE: Nutrition summary
DASHBOARD_SUMMARY.GOALS_BODY: Set goals to see progress rings and daily limits.
DASHBOARD_SUMMARY.MACROS_BODY: Add protein, carbs, fats, and fiber targets to see macro progress bars.
DASHBOARD_SUMMARY.CALORIES_BODY: Set your daily calorie target to see progress rings and weekly status.

HYDRATION_CARD.TITLE: Hydration
HYDRATION_CARD.GOAL_BODY: Set a daily water target to track progress.

CYCLE_CARD.TITLE: Cycle

TDEE_CARD.TITLE: Energy expenditure
TDEE_CARD.EMPTY: Fill in your profile and log meals to calculate TDEE.

HINTS.DEFICIT_TOO_AGGRESSIVE: Your calorie deficit is very aggressive. Consider increasing your target to avoid muscle loss.
HINTS.DEFICIT_MODERATE: Good moderate deficit for steady weight loss.
HINTS.DEFICIT_MILD: Mild deficit — weight loss will be slow but sustainable.
HINTS.MAINTENANCE_ON_TRACK: You're eating close to maintenance. Great for weight stability.
HINTS.SURPLUS_WHILE_LOSING_GOAL: You're in a surplus but your goal is to lose weight. Consider reducing your target.
HINTS.SURPLUS_TOO_AGGRESSIVE: Large surplus — you may gain weight faster than desired.
HINTS.SURPLUS_MODERATE: Moderate surplus — good for lean muscle gain.
HINTS.REVIEW_GOALS: Review your calorie target based on your current goals.

SUMMARY.EMPTY: TDEE needs profile data plus logged food and body measurements before it can become useful.
SUMMARY.ESTIMATED: This is a formula-based estimate from your profile. Keep logging meals and weight to switch to adaptive TDEE.
SUMMARY.ADAPTIVE: This estimate uses your logged intake and body trend, so it should track your real maintenance level better than a formula alone.

SETUP.TITLE: What is needed
SETUP.SUBTITLE: Adaptive TDEE works best with a profile, consistent food logs, and regular weight entries.
SETUP.PROFILE_TEXT: Sex, age, height, current weight, and activity level are used for the formula estimate.
SETUP.MEALS_TEXT: About two weeks of logged calories gives the model enough intake data.
SETUP.WEIGHT_TEXT: Several weight entries let the app compare intake against body changes.

MICRONUTRIENTS.TITLE: Micronutrients
MICRONUTRIENTS.NO_DATA: No micronutrient data available. Link this product to a USDA food to see details.
MICRONUTRIENTS.NO_DAILY_DATA: No micronutrient data for today. Link your products to USDA foods to track vitamins & minerals.

USDA_SEARCH.TITLE: Search USDA Foods

WEARABLES.NO_DATA: No wearable data for today. Connect a device to track activity.
